query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_profiles` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `state` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `region` varchar(50),
  `status` enum('active','recruiting','paused','future') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `idealInvestorProfile` text,
  `notGoodFor` text,
  `budgetMin` decimal(15,2),
  `budgetMax` decimal(15,2),
  `commonPropertyTypes` varchar(255),
  `commonBedroomRanges` varchar(100),
  `commonAmenities` text,
  `cashFlowProfile` enum('low','medium','high','very_high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `appreciationProfile` enum('low','medium','high','very_high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `regulationRisk` enum('low','medium','high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `managementDifficulty` enum('low','medium','high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `seasonalityProfile` enum('year_round','seasonal','highly_seasonal') DEFAULT 'year_round',
  `personalUseAttractiveness` enum('low','medium','high') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `remoteOwnershipFriendly` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 1,
  `vibeTag` varchar(100),
  `talkingPoints` text,
  `commonObjections` text,
  `sampleBuyerScenarios` text,
  `regulationNotes` text,
  `internalNotes` text,
  `scoringWeightCashFlow` int DEFAULT 20,
  `scoringWeightAppreciation` int DEFAULT 15,
  `scoringWeightRegulation` int DEFAULT 15,
  `scoringWeightManagement` int DEFAULT 10,
  `scoringWeightPersonalUse` int DEFAULT 10,
  `scoringWeightBudget` int DEFAULT 20,
  `scoringWeightVibe` int DEFAULT 10,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_agent_assignments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `marketProfileId` int NOT NULL,
  `agentId` int NOT NULL,
  `isPrimary` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0,
  `budgetSpecialization` varchar(100),
  `maxLeadCapacity` int DEFAULT 20,
  `currentLeadCount` int DEFAULT 0,
  `isAvailable` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 1,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`marketProfileId`) REFERENCES `market_profiles`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`agentId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_case_studies` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `marketProfileId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `propertyType` varchar(100),
  `bedrooms` int,
  `purchasePrice` decimal(15,2),
  `annualRevenue` decimal(15,2),
  `cashOnCashReturn` decimal(5,2),
  `description` text,
  `keyAmenities` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`marketProfileId`) REFERENCES `market_profiles`(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `market_match_sessions` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `contactId` int NOT NULL,
  `isaId` int NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('active','completed','abandoned') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  `callNotes` text,
  `investorProfile` json,
  `aiInferences` json,
  `topMarketRecommendations` json,
  `recommendedAgentId` int,
  `overallConfidenceScore` int,
  `callSummary` text,
  `followUpEmailDraft` text,
  `handoffNotes` text,
  `nextActionRecommendation` text,
  `crmWritebackCompleted` tinyint(1) DEFAULT 0,
  `contactStatusSuggestion` varchar(50),
  `tagsApplied` varchar(500),
  `startedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `durationSeconds` int,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`contactId`) REFERENCES `contacts`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`isaId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`recommendedAgentId`) REFERENCES `users`(`id`)
);
